messages.content:
翻译：As the main force of the tertiary industry, the development of retail industry can reflect the development state and trend of the economy in real time. In recent years, China has vigorously promoted the supply-side structural reform and taken many targeted measures in order to promote the reform of the retail industry[1]. The 2017 Government Work Report pointed out that the combination of offline stores and online shopping should be promoted, and the 2019 Government Work Report once again put forward the concept of "Internet plus" to encourage the transformation of traditional industries through new technologies and new models. At the same time, e-commerce in our country after nearly 20 years of rapid development, both online shopping mode and online consumption quantity have tended to saturation[2]. However, under the background of the continuous upgrading of consumer demand and the continuous adjustment of industrial structure, this single online shopping mode is no longer highly competitive. Under the collective action of these two backgrounds, Internet retail enterprises begin to re-explore the offline value and compete for the right to speak of offline retail through mergers and acquisitions[3]. As a growth mode of outward expansion, merger and acquisition can help the company quickly realize resource integration, connect the upper and lower industrial chains, expand business scope and play synergistic effect. However, the specific acquisition of the retail industry, whether to achieve the expected acquisition targets, are worthy of our specific in-depth study[4]. Moreover, the issue of the merits and demerits of M&A performance is also a matter of great concern to enterprise managers. Therefore, it is very important to choose an appropriate performance evaluation method and make an objective and correct evaluation of M&A performance scientifically and comprehensively[5].
In order to study the merger and acquisition performance of retail industry under the background of new retail, this paper will analyze the case of Suning Tesco's merger and acquisition of Carrefour China. Carrefour China has a high reputation, mature sales mode and experience, while Suning has advanced Internet technology and developed logistics, the two advantages complement each other[6]. Under the background that the domestic retail market tends to integrate online and offline resources gradually, the acquisition of Carrefour by Suning Tesco has a very important impact on the future development of the whole domestic retail industry[7]. Suning not only obtains high-quality offline retail resources, but also provides a good foundation and a new exploration opportunity for Suning's various business model innovation. Meanwhile, this merger is also a reference exploration, which provides a reference for the integration of online and offline retail resources[8]. Therefore, choosing the case of Suning Tesco's merger and acquisition of Carrefour China can enrich the merger and acquisition case studies in the Internet retail industry and provide reference for the strategic integration among other retail enterprises.

作为第三产业的主力军，零售业的发展可以实时反映经济的发展状态和趋势。近年来，中国大力推进供给侧结构性改革，采取了许多有针对性的措施来推进零售业的改革。2017年政府工作报告指出，要促进线下实体店与线上购物的结合，而2019年政府工作报告再次提出了“互联网+”的概念，鼓励通过新技术、新模式推动传统产业的转型。同时，我国电子商务经过近20年的快速发展，无论是在线购物模式还是在线消费量，都趋于饱和。然而，在消费需求不断升级和产业结构不断调整的背景下，这种单一的在线购物模式已不再具有高度竞争力。在这两个背景的集体作用下，互联网零售企业开始重新探索线下价值，通过并购争夺线下零售的发言权。作为一种外部扩张的增长模式，合并收购可以帮助企业快速实现资源整合，连接上下游产业链，扩大业务范围并发挥协同效应。然而，零售业的具体收购是否能实现预期的收购目标，值得我们进行具体的深入研究。此外，M&A绩效优劣的问题也是企业经理人关注的重大问题。因此，选择适当的绩效评估方法，并科学全面地进行M&A绩效的客观、正确评估，具有非常重要的意义。

为了研究新零售背景下零售业合并收购的绩效，本文将分析苏宁易购收购家乐福中国的案例。家乐福在中国拥有很高的声誉、成熟的销售模式和经验，而苏宁则拥有先进的互联网技术和发达的物流，两者优势互补。在国内零售市场逐渐趋于整合在线上和线下资源的背景下，苏宁易购收购家乐福对整个国内零售业未来的发展具有非常重要的影响。苏宁不仅获得了高质量的线下零售资源，还为苏宁各种业务模式创新提供了良好的基础和新的探索机会。同时，这次合并收购也是一次参考性的探索，为在线上和线下零售资源的融合提供了参考。因此，选择苏宁易购收购家乐福中国的案例可以丰富互联网零售行业的合并收购案例研究，为其他零售企业的战略整合提供参考。
翻译：The Effect of Mergers and Acquisitions on the Technological Performance of Companies in a High-tech Environment

This is a title, it means "Research on the Innovation of Business Models in China's Retail Industry under the Context of Supply-side Structural Reform".
供给侧结构性改革背景下我国零售业商业模式创新研究在知网上的英文名称

The English name for the research on "Research on the Innovation of Business Models in China's Retail Industry under the Context of Supply-side Structural Reform" in CNKI is likely to be "Study on the Innovation of Business Models in China's Retail Industry under the Background of Supply-Side Structural Reform". However, it may vary depending on the specific publication.
